name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_srapc_uvw_asset_all_data_withphoto
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_srapc' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_asset_all_data_withphoto' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`Last_Modified` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Last_Modified_User` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Construction_Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Condition Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Next_Inspection_Scheduled` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Last_Inspection_Completed` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`Last_Modified` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Last_Modified_User` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Construction_Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Condition Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Next_Inspection_Scheduled` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Last_Inspection_Completed` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'Last_Modified|Last_Modified_User|Construction_Date|Condition Date|Next_Inspection_Scheduled|Last_Inspection_Completed' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_srapc`.`uvw_asset_all_data_withphoto`
